title: {{name}}'s Sea Life Adventure
intro: Dive in, {{name}}! Today we explore numbers and words with friendly sea creatures under the waves.

activities.title: Counting Coral Friends
activities.instructions: A clownfish is visiting each piece of coral. Count carefully — one touch for each friend.
activities.prompt: There are 7 starfish on the reef and 5 more swim over. How many starfish are there altogether? Draw them in the box, then write the number.
activities.answerSpaceHint: Draw the starfish, then write your total.
activities.illustrationHint: Soft watercolour reef with clownfish and coral

activities.title: Sentence Shells
activities.instructions: Seashells hold secret sentences. Make each one a complete thought.
activities.prompt: Write one full sentence about a dolphin leaping over the waves. Remember a capital letter and a full stop.
activities.answerSpaceHint: Write your sentence on the lines.
activities.illustrationHint: A leaping dolphin silhouette above gentle waves

activities.title: Ocean Animal Names
activities.instructions: Marine biologists name the animals they meet.
activities.prompt: Name three sea animals you know. Circle the one that has a shell.
activities.answerSpaceHint: Write three names and circle one.
activities.illustrationHint: Crab, turtle, and jellyfish sketched in ink

closingNote: Well done, {{name}}! Dry your fins and show a grown-up your reef of answers.
